subject: [PATCH v3 11/16] userfaultfd: add UFFD_FEATURE_RWP_ASYNC for async fault resolution

2026-05-22.patch_summary: This patch adds a new feature to the userfaultfd system, called UFFD_FEATURE_RWP_ASYNC. This feature allows for asynchronous resolution of read-write page faults, which is useful for working-set tracking in virtual machines. When this feature is enabled, the kernel restores access to pages in-place and continues without blocking the faulting thread. The VMM can then reconstruct the access pattern after the fact using PAGEMAP_SCAN. This patch also upgrades writable private anon PTEs when necessary to prevent COW-faults on re-access of RWP'd writable pages.
